# Symdicate

> Composable multi-agent framework for GitHub Copilot — persona grafting, cognitive identity caching, and agent fusion.

Symdicate is an open-source collection of GitHub Copilot agents (MIT licence) with structured
cognitive identities. NeuroGraft, the meta-agent, overlays personas onto any Copilot agent at
one of four cognitive levels without replacing its underlying capabilities.

## Key pages

- README: https://github.com/CTOUT/Symdicate/blob/main/README.md
- Changelog: https://github.com/CTOUT/Symdicate/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
- Contributing: https://github.com/CTOUT/Symdicate/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
